def negative_generator_pipeline_materialized_between_each_transformation_stage():
    rule_id = "generator_pipeline_materialized_between_each_transformation_stage"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag pipelines that repeatedly materialize intermediate lists between stages."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
